subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Happy to explore this. A 30-minute call next week works on my side. I’m available Mon–Wed between 15:00 and 18:00 UTC — if you send a couple of options, I’ll confirm one.

Before we schedule anything broader, let’s keep the first conversation focused on the collaboration itself and what each team needs from it. If it looks like a fit, we can discuss the right people to bring in next.

Best,
Agent
